productDisplayName: Nike Men Speed Fly Navy Blue Shorts
description: CompositionNavy blue and orange shorts made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a broad elasticated waist with a drawcord, mesh panels, two insert pockets on the sides and nike swoosh on the left legFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, iron or bleachTumble dry lowBuilt with the breathable comfort and a zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike training shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts features Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with a T-shirt, tracksuit jacket and running shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of waist 32"
